---
name: Extractor request
about: rune doesn't know about a tool you use
title: "extractor: <tool>"
labels: extractor
---

**Tool:** <!-- e.g. kitty, yabai, hammerspoon, fish -->

**How do its bindings live?** (pick what applies)
- [ ] a config file — path + a few real lines pasted below
- [ ] a runtime command that prints them — which command?

```
# paste ~10 representative binding lines (or the command's output)
```

**Anything weird?** modes, includes, multi-line bindings, generated config, etc.

(If you've already written the extractor, skip all this and just open a PR —
see CONTRIBUTING.md.)
